_comment: 48h health monitor cron job template. Replace {SKILL_DIR} with actual path.
name: 48h-health-monitor

payload.prompt:
执行系统健康检查：python3 {SKILL_DIR}/scripts/health_monitor.py --report

将输出结果通过 Telegram 发送给用户。若有问题，等待用户回复后按指令执行修复：
- 用户回复 "health fix all" → python3 {SKILL_DIR}/scripts/health_monitor.py --fix all
- 用户回复 "health fix 1,2" → python3 {SKILL_DIR}/scripts/health_monitor.py --fix "1,2"
- 用户回复 "health skip" → 跳过
